compartments.label: NEURONS
compartments.snippet: Large central compartment labeled 'NEURONS' in panel E, containing ADF, AWB, URX, and RIC neuron sub-compartments.

compartments.label: ADF
compartments.snippet: Blue pentagon labeled 'ADF' inside the NEURONS compartment in panel E; tph-1 is associated with this neuron.

compartments.label: AWB
compartments.snippet: Green triangle labeled 'AWB' inside the NEURONS compartment in panel E; ser-6 is associated with this neuron.

compartments.label: URX
compartments.snippet: Yellow hexagon labeled 'URX' inside the NEURONS compartment in panel E; mod-1 is associated with this neuron. Also labeled in panel C fluorescence images.

compartments.label: RIC
compartments.snippet: Red hexagon labeled 'RIC' inside the NEURONS compartment in panel E; tbh-1 is associated with this neuron.

compartments.label: INTESTINE
compartments.snippet: Green rounded rectangle labeled 'INTESTINE' in panel E; contains nhr-76, ATGL, beta-oxidation, and fat loss.

genes.snippet: Labeled next to the ADF neuron in panel E; also referenced in panels A and B as 'tph-1;Patgl-1::GFP' mutant. Serotonin biosynthesis enzyme in ADF neurons.
Labeled on the URX neuron in panel E; also referenced in panels C and D as 'Pflp-8::mod-1SAS'. Serotonin-gated chloride channel receptor in URX neurons.
Labeled next to the AWB neuron in panel E. Serotonin receptor associated with AWB neurons.
Labeled next to the RIC neuron in panel E. Tyramine beta-hydroxylase; involved in octopamine synthesis in RIC neurons.
Labeled inside the INTESTINE compartment in panel E, upstream of ATGL with an arrow indicating positive regulation.
Labeled inside the INTESTINE compartment in panel E, downstream of nhr-76, with an arrow pointing to beta-oxidation and fat loss. Referred to as 'Patgl-1::GFP' reporter in experimental panels.

tentative_edges.snippet: Panel E shows '5-HT' label on arrow from ADF (tph-1) to URX (mod-1), indicating serotonin neurotransmission from ADF to URX.

tentative_edges.relation: serotonin receptor activation in URX relays endocrine signal
tentative_edges.snippet: Panel E shows dashed arrow from URX (mod-1) through 'endocrine signal' label to INTESTINE compartment.

tentative_edges.relation: endocrine signal from NEURONS to INTESTINE
tentative_edges.snippet: Panel E shows large dashed arrow labeled 'endocrine signal' connecting the NEURONS compartment to the INTESTINE compartment.
Panel E shows arrow from nhr-76 to ATGL inside the INTESTINE compartment, indicating nhr-76 drives ATGL expression.
Panel E shows arrow from ATGL to 'β-oxidation / Fat loss' inside INTESTINE, indicating ATGL activity leads to fat catabolism.
Panel E shows 'Oct' label on arrow from RIC (tbh-1) to AWB (ser-6), indicating octopamine neurotransmission.

tentative_edges.relation: AWB neuron contributes to NEURONS endocrine signaling pathway
tentative_edges.snippet: AWB is depicted as part of the NEURONS network in panel E, with ser-6 labeled, contributing to the circuit that drives endocrine signaling.
